# Sample Project

A short blurb describing the project. No heading yet, just prose.

## Installation

Steps to install.

```bash
pip install sample-project
```

### From source

```bash
git clone https://example.com/sample.git
cd sample
pip install -e .
```

### Via pipx

```bash
pipx install sample-project
```

## Usage

Basic usage example.

```python
from sample import greet
greet("world")
```

### Configuration

Environment variables are read from `.env`:

```
SAMPLE_TOKEN=xxxx
SAMPLE_DEBUG=1
```

## Contributing

Pull requests welcome. Please open an issue first to discuss the change.
